name: Hlomla Magopeni
title: Full-Stack Developer
bio: I don't just write code. I build scalable solutions that solve real-world problems and improve community access to services.
aboutBio: I'm a motivated Application Development student at the Cape Peninsula University of Technology, passionate about building full-stack applications that make a real difference. From ride-hailing platforms that serve the unconnected to clinic booking systems that streamline healthcare access — I thrive on turning complex problems into clean, maintainable software. I believe technology should bridge gaps, not create them, and every line of code I write is driven by that conviction.
